mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_file_bundle WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM t_file_bundle ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_file_bundle (name, description, root_path, type, status, file_count) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{rootPath}, #{type}, #{status}, #{fileCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_file_bundle SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_file_bundle SET file_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
